nasb.text: but only, they kept hearing, “He who once persecuted us is now preaching the faith which he once tried to destroy.”

esv.text: They only were hearing it said, “He who used to persecute us is now preaching the faith he once tried to destroy.”

cnv.text: 不過聽說“那個從前迫害我們的，現在竟然傳揚他以前所殘害的信仰”，

ccb.text: 他们只是听人说：“那个从前迫害我们的人如今在传扬他曾试图摧毁的信仰。”

csbs.text: 他们只是听说：“以前逼迫我们的那个人，现在却在传扬他曾经残害过的信仰。”
